35.rule: Project every non-cyan border marker onto the nearest cell of the solid cyan rectangle.

66.rule: Recover the hidden blue S/U orthogonal path between the red start pair and green end pair; recolor path cells green.

90.rule: Find the unique maximum-area all-black axis-aligned rectangle and paint it pink (6).

structural.runtime_shape_error: Fail: [ONNXRuntimeError] : 1 : FAIL : This is an invalid model. Error: two nodes with same node name (best_c).
Fail: [ONNXRuntimeError] : 1 : FAIL : This is an invalid model. Error: two nodes with same node name (best_h).

377.rule: Read colors of nested filled rectangles and render them as an odd concentric square.
